task: T12 - Managed-Only and Ambiguity Skip Guardrails

cases: note:<path> in managed set → eligible
note:<path> NOT in managed set → skipped_unmanaged
folder:<path> in managed set → eligible
folder:<path> NOT in managed set → skipped_unmanaged
<sourcePath>|<linkIndex> sourcePath in managedNotePaths → eligible
<sourcePath>|<linkIndex> sourcePath NOT in managedNotePaths → skipped_unmanaged
unrecognized key format (no prefix, no pipe) → skipped_unmanaged
note: with empty path → skipped_unmanaged
folder: with empty path → skipped_unmanaged
link key with non-numeric index → skipped_unmanaged
link key with trailing pipe only → skipped_unmanaged
link key with index within bounds → eligible
link key with index at boundary (== count, valid append) → eligible
link key with out-of-bounds index → skipped_ambiguous
link key with index 1 on zero-link section → skipped_ambiguous
link key with index 0 on zero-link section → eligible (create at start)
link key with no heading in content and index 0 → eligible (create with missing heading)
link key with no heading in content and index 1 → skipped_ambiguous
note:<path> key → always eligible regardless of content
folder:<path> key → always eligible regardless of content
bare heading line (non-prefixed) is detected correctly
unmanaged note key returns skipped_unmanaged ACK with zero file mutations
managed note key proceeds normally to applied
unmanaged link key returns skipped_unmanaged ACK with zero file mutations
out-of-bounds link index returns skipped_ambiguous ACK with zero file mutations
no knownKeys provided → guardrail bypassed, existing behavior preserved
unmanaged folder key returns skipped_unmanaged ACK with zero file mutations
